title: Welcome to Via Nova
summary: Introduction to Via Nova Distillery, its mission, products and operating philosophy.
purpose: To provide new employees with an understanding of the business, its products and expectations.
safety_notes: All visitors and staff must follow site safety requirements and wear required PPE when entering production areas.

steps.title: Understand the Company
steps.body: Via Nova is an Australian distillery focused on producing gin, vodka and ready-to-drink products using innovative distillation technology.

steps.title: Learn the Mission
steps.body: Our goal is to create cleaner, more approachable spirits while reducing waste and improving production efficiency.

steps.title: Understand the Product Range
steps.body: Become familiar with Via Nova Gin, Via Nova Vodka, New Wave Gin, New Wave Vodka and the RTD portfolio.

steps.title: Learn the Operating Philosophy
steps.body: Safety, quality, compliance, innovation and continuous improvement are core operating principles.

steps.title: Become Familiar with Key Systems
steps.body: Understand the role of VNDManuf, VND-DAQ, Xero, Shopify and SharePoint within the business.

steps.title: Review Compliance Obligations
steps.body: Recognise that the distillery operates under excise, food safety, workplace safety and liquor licensing requirements.

risks.issue: Lack of understanding of company systems

risks.prevention: Consult Nova U articles and supervisors before undertaking unfamiliar tasks.

troubleshooting: If unsure of a process, stop and seek assistance from your supervisor.

title: Site Tour
summary: Overview of all major operational areas within Via Nova.
purpose: To familiarise staff with site layout and operational flow.
safety_notes: Stay within designated walkways. Follow all signage and PPE requirements.

steps.title: Raw Materials Area
steps.body: Review spirit receival, botanical storage and packaging material storage locations.

steps.title: Production Area
steps.body: Observe distillation equipment, blending vessels and associated utilities.

steps.title: Packaging Area
steps.body: Review bottling, canning, labelling and shrink seal operations.

steps.title: Finished Goods Area
steps.body: Inspect pallet storage, dispatch preparation and stock control locations.

steps.title: Bond Store
steps.body: Understand excise-controlled storage requirements and access controls.

steps.title: Office and Administration
steps.body: Review VNDManuf, Xero, SharePoint and Nova U administrative functions.

troubleshooting: Contact a supervisor if access is required to restricted operational areas.

title: Spirit Receiving
summary: Procedure for receiving bulk spirit into inventory.
purpose: To ensure all incoming spirit is accurately recorded and traceable.
prerequisites: Approved purchase order and delivery documentation.
safety_notes: Spirit is highly flammable. Eliminate ignition sources. Wear PPE.

steps.title: Verify Documentation
steps.body: Confirm supplier details, batch information and delivery paperwork.

steps.title: Inspect Delivery
steps.body: Check seals, packaging integrity and signs of contamination.

steps.title: Record Receipt
steps.body: Enter receipt into VNDManuf against the appropriate product code.

steps.title: Transfer Spirit
steps.body: Transfer spirit into approved storage vessels using approved procedures.

steps.title: Label Inventory
steps.body: Apply batch identification and traceability information.

steps.title: Verify Stock
steps.body: Confirm inventory balances match physical quantities.

troubleshooting: Quarantine any suspect deliveries and notify management immediately.

title: How to Dilute Gin60 to Gin42
summary: Standard process for reducing spirit strength from approximately 60% ABV to bottling strength.
purpose: To achieve consistent final product ABV and maintain quality standards.
prerequisites: Released batch, calibrated measurement equipment and approved water source.
safety_notes: Use food-grade hoses and vessels. Avoid slips caused by spills.

steps.title: Verify Batch Release
steps.body: Confirm QC approval and batch release status.

steps.title: Measure Initial ABV
steps.body: Confirm current ABV using approved testing methods.

steps.title: Calculate Water Addition
steps.body: Use approved dilution calculations or VNDManuf formulas.

steps.title: Add Water
steps.body: Add calculated water quantity gradually while mixing.

steps.title: Allow Product to Marry
steps.body: Allow sufficient mixing and resting time before testing.

steps.title: Verify Final ABV
steps.body: Retest and confirm final specification is achieved.

steps.title: Record Results
steps.body: Record dilution details in batch records and VNDManuf.

troubleshooting: If final ABV is outside specification, quarantine the batch and notify QA.

title: Via Nova Gin Product Knowledge
summary: Product knowledge guide for Via Nova Gin.
purpose: To provide staff with product understanding for production and sales activities.
safety_notes: Responsible service and consumption of alcohol principles apply.

steps.title: Understand Product Positioning
steps.body: Via Nova Gin represents a modern Australian interpretation of gin.

steps.title: Learn Key Flavour Notes
steps.body: Expect bright juniper, citrus and balanced spice characteristics.

steps.title: Understand Production Philosophy
steps.body: The product reflects Via Nova's approach to cleaner flavour extraction and improved efficiency.

steps.title: Know Key Selling Points
steps.body: Focus on flavour clarity, innovation and Australian production.

steps.title: Understand Storage Requirements
steps.body: Store upright in a cool, dry location away from direct sunlight.

troubleshooting: Refer to the latest approved product specification if unsure.
